title: ZWNJ / Khona\u200Clit-po Integrity
description: The canonical covenant string carries U+200C. This fixture checks whether local ingestion and protected-literal review keep that boundary visible as evidence.

inputs.protectedBaseline: Khona\u200Clit-po names a boundary that should stay visible. The archive keeps the ZWNJ because the boundary is part of the record.
inputs.maskReference: Keep the covenant string intact. Report the boundary. Keep the note local and reviewable.
inputs.messageDraft: Preserve Khona\u200Clit-po and route EXHIBIT-ZWNJ through local review with the U+200C boundary intact.
inputs.protectedOutput: Preserve Khona\u200Clit-po in EXHIBIT-ZWNJ. Report that the U+200C boundary remains intact under local review.

calibrationNotes: This fixture keeps U+200C materially visible.
The review should catch boundary mutation without claiming platform behavior.
